fix1_cta_hover.description: hover:text-accent on CTA links (desktop + mobile), transition-colors present

evidence.php_mobile_sep_link: HeaderMain.php line 45: class includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'. Old 'hover:opacity-60' is absent.
evidence.php_desktop_sep_link: HeaderMain.php line 114: class includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'. Old 'hover:opacity-60' is absent.
evidence.tsx_mobile_sep_link: HeaderMain.tsx line 532: cn() string includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'. Old 'hover:opacity-60' is absent.
evidence.tsx_desktop_sep_link: HeaderMain.tsx line 667: cn() string includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'. Old 'hover:opacity-60' is absent.

fix2_search_hover.description: hover:text-accent transition-colors on search submit buttons (desktop + mobile)

evidence.php_desktop_search_btn: HeaderMain.php line 90: button class includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'.
evidence.php_mobile_search_btn: HeaderMain.php line 164: button class includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'.
evidence.tsx_desktop_search_btn: HeaderMain.tsx line 625: button className includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'.
evidence.tsx_mobile_search_btn: HeaderMain.tsx line 748: button className includes 'transition-colors hover:text-accent'.

evidence.php: HeaderMainItem.php line 55: class attribute includes 'md:min-w-[calc(100%+3rem)]' alongside existing 'md:min-w-max'.
evidence.tsx: HeaderMainItem.tsx line 181: cn() string includes 'md:min-w-[calc(100%+3rem)]' alongside 'md:min-w-max'.
evidence.rendered: page_audit extraSelector 'submenu_minw' found=true on sections 0, 2, 5, 7 (all 4 submenu-bearing instances with distinct submenu panels, plus section 0 counts 5 because it has 5 separate submenus). Sections without submenus (1, 3, 4, 6, 8) correctly show 0.

fix4_transition_animation.description: transition-[transform,opacity] replaces transition-all on header-main wrapper

evidence.php: HeaderMain.php line 54: base class is 'transition-[transform,opacity]'. 'transition-all' is absent.
evidence.tsx: HeaderMain.tsx line 548: cn() base includes 'transition-[transform,opacity]'. 'transition-all' is absent.
evidence.rendered_class_list: All 9 sections show 'transition-[transform,opacity]' in their classes arrays (confirmed by direct inspection of page_audit section[0..8].classes). Note: the CSS selector 'transition_transform_opacity' page_audit extraSelector returned found=false for all sections — this is a known limitation of querySelector with special characters (comma inside brackets); the class presence is confirmed directly from the classes arrays.

fix5_fixed_offset_32px.description: 32px base gap added to --fixed-offset calculation in JS

evidence.js: HeaderMain.js line 96: 'Math.floor( offset ) + 32 + "px"'. Previously was 'Math.floor( offset ) + "px"'. The +32 integer addition happens before string concatenation, yielding e.g. '32px' when no other fixed elements are above.

fix6_pseudo_w_full.description: before:md:w-full replaces before:md:right-0 on submenu hover-bridge pseudo-element

evidence.php: HeaderMainItem.php line 55: class includes 'before:md:w-full'. 'before:md:right-0' is absent.
evidence.tsx: HeaderMainItem.tsx line 181: cn() string includes 'before:md:w-full'. 'before:md:right-0' is absent.
evidence.rendered: page_audit extraSelector 'pseudo_w_full' found=true on sections 0 (count 5), 2 (count 1), 5 (count 1), 7 (count 1) — all submenu-bearing instances. Sections without submenus correctly show 0.

fix7_focus_outline.description: outline outline-0 outline-transparent base state on all interactive top-level nav elements

evidence.php_button: HeaderMainItem.php line 39: button class includes 'outline outline-0 outline-transparent focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'. Old 'focus-visible:outline' lone class is absent.
evidence.php_link: HeaderMainItem.php line 29: ThemeLink className includes 'outline outline-0 outline-transparent focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'.
evidence.php_subitem: HeaderMainSubItem.php line 21: link className includes 'outline outline-0 outline-transparent focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'.
evidence.tsx_button: HeaderMainItem.tsx line 131: cn() string includes 'outline outline-0 outline-transparent focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'.
evidence.tsx_link: HeaderMainItem.tsx line 122: Link className includes 'outline outline-0 outline-transparent focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'.

fix8_rAF_focus.description: requestAnimationFrame wraps focus() after openSubmenu() on ArrowDown/Up from trigger

evidence.js_arrowdown: HeaderMain.js lines 427-432: when submenu is not open, openSubmenu(button) is called, then requestAnimationFrame defers focus to freshItems[0]. Comment '// Defer focus until after display:none is removed (fix 8)' confirms intent.
evidence.js_arrowup: HeaderMain.js lines 443-448: same pattern, defers focus to freshItems[freshItems.length - 1].
evidence.already_open_path: When submenu is already open (isOpen === true), the rAF is skipped and items[0]/items[last] is focused synchronously (lines 434, 450) — correct, as the element is already visible.

fix9_items_requery.description: items re-queried inside handleSubmenuKeydown on every keydown

evidence.js: HeaderMain.js lines 360-362: inside handleSubmenuKeydown, 'const currentItems = Array.from(submenu.querySelectorAll("[role=\"menuitem\"]"))' is called on each invocation. Comment '// Re-query items to avoid stale refs' confirms intent.
evidence.usage: All ArrowDown/Up/Home/End cases within handleSubmenuKeydown now use 'currentItems' (lines 375-389) rather than the stale closure variable 'items'. The 'items' static snapshot is still used only in the trigger button's already-open path (lines 434, 450) where DOM stability is guaranteed.

fixed_header_width.evidence: All fixed-scroll instances (sections 0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8) carry md:[&.scrolling]:left-1/2, md:[&.scrolling]:-translate-x-1/2, md:[&.scrolling]:w-(--max-container) or the hide-on-scroll-down equivalents. Not-fixed instance (section 4, data-fixed-scroll-desktop=0) has none of these — only base classes. PHP lines 55-60 and TSX lines 550-565 confirmed unchanged.

z_index_stacking.evidence: md:z-200 present in class list for all 8 fixed-scroll instances (sections 0-3, 5-8). Section 4 (not fixed) correctly absent. md:z-[210] on submenu divs: confirmed via PHP line 55 and TSX line 181 unchanged. page_audit submenu_minw selector also confirmed these submenus render correctly.

dropdown_gap.evidence: HeaderMainItem.php line 55 contains 'md:mt-6'. HeaderMainItem.tsx line 181 contains 'md:mt-6'. Unchanged.

click_outside_close.evidence: HeaderMain.js lines 529-543: document click handler iterates subMenuButtons, checks clickedInsideSubmenu and clickedTrigger. Logic unchanged.

role_menubar.evidence: HeaderMain.php line 150: <ul role="menubar">. HeaderMain.tsx line 126: innerBlocksProps includes role: 'menubar'. page_audit: menubar_ul found=true, count=1 across all 9 sections.

role_menuitem.evidence: HeaderMainItem.php line 38: button role="menuitem". Line 31: ThemeLink 'role' => 'menuitem'. HeaderMainItem.tsx lines 120, 138: role="menuitem" on both Link and button. Unchanged.

alTopLevelItems_traversal.evidence: HeaderMain.js lines 294-342: allTopLevelItems selector, focusTopLevelItem helper, and plain-link keydown listeners all unchanged.

build.notes: Build compiles without errors. 0 lint errors in Header block files (HeaderMain.tsx, HeaderMainItem.tsx, HeaderMainSubItem.tsx, HeaderMain.js, HeaderMainItem.php, HeaderMain.php). All 24 lint errors are pre-existing in unrelated blocks (MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel).

registration.notes: taktician_validate_all registration check passed. All child blocks valid.

tsxPhpSync.notes: taktician_validate_all sync check passed all 8 sub-checks: phpExtractPattern, phpDocblock, htmlStructureSync, attributeUsage, contextConsistency, classNameInsideBlockProps, redundantNullCoalescing, phpFunctionExistence. All 9 new fixes are applied consistently in both PHP and TSX.

attributes.notes: No attribute schema changes in this revision. Previously verified passing.

edgeCases.notes: Not-fixed instance (section 4) has only base transition-[transform,opacity] class — no z-index or positioning classes. Sections without submenus (1, 3, 4, 6, 8) correctly show submenu_minw=false and pseudo_w_full=false.

interactiveBehavior.notes: All interactive fixes (8, 9) verified by code review. Fix 8 rAF deferral: openSubmenu() is synchronous (adds 'block' class), rAF fires after paint so display:none is removed before focus() is called. Fix 9 re-query: currentItems is fresh on every keydown, preventing stale-ref issues after any dynamic DOM changes in the submenu.

accessibility.notes: All WAI-ARIA menubar pattern requirements satisfied. Focus outline base state (outline outline-0 outline-transparent) now correctly established on all interactive elements, preventing OS default outlines from showing in non-keyboard contexts while keeping focus-visible:outline-2 for keyboard users. Consistent across top-level buttons, top-level links, and sub-item links.

markupDuplication.notes: Unchanged. Dual search forms remain intentional (desktop utility row + mobile collapsible).

tsxPhpSync2.notes: All 9 fixes applied symmetrically in PHP and TSX. No structural divergence.

specCompliance.notes: All 9 revision-8 fixes applied. All regression checks pass. 9 block instances on test page, all inside demo containers.

passedChecks: Fix 1 VERIFIED: hover:text-accent on desktop SEP link (PHP:114, TSX:667), mobile SEP link (PHP:45, TSX:532). hover:opacity-60 absent.
Fix 2 VERIFIED: hover:text-accent transition-colors on desktop search button (PHP:90, TSX:625) and mobile search button (PHP:164, TSX:748).
Fix 3 VERIFIED: md:min-w-[calc(100%+3rem)] on submenu div (PHP:55, TSX:181). Rendered: found on all 5 submenu-bearing instances per page_audit.
Fix 4 VERIFIED: transition-[transform,opacity] on header-main wrapper (PHP:54, TSX:548). transition-all absent. Class confirmed in all 9 rendered section class arrays.
Fix 5 VERIFIED: +32 added to --fixed-offset in JS calculateFixedOffset() (JS:96). String is Math.floor(offset) + 32 + 'px'.
Fix 6 VERIFIED: before:md:w-full on submenu pseudo-element (PHP:55, TSX:181). before:md:right-0 absent. Rendered: found on all 4 submenu-bearing instances per page_audit.

Fix 7 VERIFIED: outline outline-0 outline-transparent base state on all interactive top-level nav elements (PHP HeaderMainItem:29,39; PHP SubItem:21; TSX HeaderMainItem:122,131). focus-visible:outline-2 preserved.
Fix 8 VERIFIED: requestAnimationFrame wraps focus() after openSubmenu() on ArrowDown (JS:427-432) and ArrowUp (JS:443-448). Already-open path uses synchronous focus.
Fix 9 VERIFIED: items re-queried inside handleSubmenuKeydown via 'const currentItems = Array.from(submenu.querySelectorAll(...))' on each call (JS:360-362). All switch cases use currentItems.
Regression: fixed header width constraint intact across all 8 fixed-scroll instances.
Regression: md:z-200 on header-main, md:z-[210] on submenus — confirmed.
Regression: md:mt-6 dropdown gap confirmed in PHP and TSX.
Regression: click-outside handler logic unchanged and correct.
Regression: role=menubar confirmed rendered in all 9 instances.
Regression: role=menuitem on all top-level buttons and links confirmed.
Build: 0 Header block lint errors. Sync: all 8 sub-checks pass. Registration: all checks pass.
